ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position the player plays */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Side the player bats from */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Side the player throws from */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the player's current contract expires */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player (foreign key) */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of plate appearances */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "three_baggers" INTEGER /* Number of triples */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "singles" INTEGER /* Number of singles */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "on_base_plus_slugging" REAL /* On-base plus slugging (OPS) */,
  "stolen_base_percentage" REAL /* Stolen base percentage */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year for these statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "fielding_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player (foreign key) */,
  "in_field_hits" INTEGER /* Number of infield hits */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of fielding errors */,
  "double_plays" INTEGER /* Number of double plays */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  "range_factor" REAL /* Range factor */,
  "errors_per_game" REAL /* Errors per game */,
  "double_plays_turned" INTEGER /* Number of double plays turned */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year for these statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player (foreign key) */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player is expected to return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., healing, recovered) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "rehabilitation_plan" TEXT /* Description of the rehabilitation plan */,
  "rehabilitation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rehabilitation in days */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player (foreign key) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the game */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of fielding errors */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* The team the player's team played against */,
  "home_or_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* The number of innings played */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* The number of pitches thrown */,
  "stolen_bases_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases attempted */,
  "stolen_bases_success" INTEGER /* Number of successful stolen bases */,
  "stolen_bases_caught" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "sacrifice_bunts" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice bunts */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies */,
  "double_plays_turned" INTEGER /* Number of double plays turned */,
  "triple_plays_turned" INTEGER /* Number of triple plays turned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "league" TEXT /* The league the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* The name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player (foreign key) */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average for the season */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage for the season */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage for the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats in the season */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of plate appearances in the season */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the season */,
  "singles" INTEGER /* Number of singles in the season */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles in the season */,
  "three_baggers" INTEGER /* Number of triples in the season */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs in the season */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in in the season */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks in the season */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts in the season */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases in the season */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing in the season */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists in the season */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors in the season */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage in the season */,
  "range_factor" REAL /* Range factor in the season */,
  "errors_per_game" REAL /* Errors per game in the season */,
  "double_plays_turned" INTEGER /* Number of double plays turned in the season */,
  "triple_plays_turned" INTEGER /* Number of triple plays turned in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team they coach (foreign key) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the coaching staff */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in coaching */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the coach joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player (foreign key) */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID from which the player is traded (foreign key) */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID to which the player is traded (foreign key) */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_details" TEXT /* Details of the trade (e.g., other players involved, cash considerations) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, voided) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_trade_history_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_trade_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_trade_history_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
